g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Rider PWA in GigShield')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Insurer Dashboard in GigShield')
sendPrompt('What does the Admin Panel do in GigShield?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI core service handle?')

sendPrompt('What does Redis do in GigShield?')

sendPrompt('How does GigShield mock the platform suspension API?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield process payouts via Razorpay?')
